echo '' > iverilog_dump.v
echo 'module iverilog_dump();' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'initial begin' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo '    $dumpfile("/home/shannon/VeriSlicer_test/Dataset/Pyverilog_general_DeepseekR1/../Error_designs/error_design_1_1/design_1.vcd");' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo '    $dumpvars(0, design_1);' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'end' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'endmodule' >> iverilog_dump.v

echo '' > iverilog_dump.v

echo 'initial begin' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo '    $dumpfile("/home/shannon/VeriSlicer_test/Dataset/Pyverilog_general_DeepseekR1/../Error_designs/error_design_5_3/design_5.vcd");' >> iverilog_dump.v

echo 'end' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'endmodule' >> iverilog_dump.v
